data.title: RuggON showcases advanced rugged solutions for mining at AIMEX 2025 to enhance safety and efficiency. Based in ADELAIDE, Australia.
data.description: RuggON, a subsidiary of Ubiqconn Technology, is enabling mining operators to excel in challenging conditions with advanced technologies. Through AI-powered driver safety, real-time fleet diagnostics, and constant connectivity via SATCOM, RuggON is revolutionizing the industry. The company's efforts are based out of ADELAIDE, Australia, and this initiative was announced on September 18, 2025, showcasing their dedication to enhancing operational efficiency and safety in mining activities.

data.title: Legal counsel for IEHP, Winston Y. Chan, responds to lawsuit by US Department of Justice filed on Sept. 17, 2025.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, Winston Y. Chan from Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher, LLP, representing Inland Empire Health Plan (IEHP), addressed the recent legal action by the United States Department of Justice in Rancho Cucamonga, California. The statement comes following a lawsuit filed on September 17, 2025, by the Department of Justice.

data.title: Jameson Irish Whiskey declares itself "Unofficial Whiskey for Football Fans" ahead of Dublin game, with fan activations in Minneapolis and Dublin. #JamesonFootball #IrishWhiskey
data.description: Jameson Irish Whiskey is preparing to celebrate the highly anticipated American Football event with an exciting new campaign. The festivities will include the launch of a football-themed flask and special fan activities in Minneapolis and Dublin. The campaign will kick off in New York on September 18, 2025. Stay tuned for more updates and join in on the celebration! Cheers to an unforgettable experience with Jameson Irish Whiskey.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for RxSight investors with losses exceeding $75,000 between May 7, 2024, and July 8, 2025. Contact James Wilson for more.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses of over $75,000 in RxSight to reach out to him directly for a discussion about potential options. If you faced losses surpassing $75,000 in RxSight during the period from May 7, 2024, to July 8, 2025, Wilson is available to address your inquiries and provide guidance on the matter.

data.title: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico refinanced a $40M credit line with Banamex, payable at a variable rate, maturing in 2030.
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP) recently disclosed the successful refinancing of a USD $40.0 million credit line that was set to mature on September 18, 2025. The company completed this transaction with Banco Nacional de México, S.A. ("Banamex") for a new five-year term with the same financial entity. Under the terms, monthly interest payments will be calculated at a variable rate tied to SOFR plus 81 basis points, and no extra commissions will be charged. The repayment of the principal amount is scheduled for the loan's maturity date on September 18, 2030.

data.title: Home flipping profit margins at 17-year low with 25.1% ROI on typical homes; Median investor purchase price at $259,700.
data.description: A recent report from ATTOM revealed that the average profit margin for flipped homes is 25.1%, showcasing a strong return on investment. This data comes alongside the announcement that the median purchase price for investors looking to flip homes has reached a peak of $259,700. The findings highlight the lucrative nature of the real estate market for those involved in flipping properties. The data was released by ATTOM, a prominent organization specializing in land, property information, and real estate analysis.

data.title: Waimea Plantation Cottages in Kauai offers up to 26% off Best Available Rates for 2026 Hawaii vacations.
data.description: In Kauai, Hawaii, on September 18, 2025, the Waimea Plantation Cottages, a historic oceanfront hotel, is inviting future guests planning a Hawaii vacation in 2026 to take advantage of a discount of up to 26% on the Best Available Rates through the "Hawaii Nei Special Offer." Those who book this special deal will also receive additional perks...

data.title: NVIDIA and UK & US leaders reveal big AI investments to boost UK as AI hub with improved infrastructure.
data.description: NVIDIA, in partnership with key leaders from the UK and US, has revealed a substantial financial commitment to bolster the UK's position as a leader in artificial intelligence. This initiative involves a substantial investment in infrastructure and fostering collaboration in the AI sector. The aim is to propel the UK into becoming a prominent force in AI with a focus on innovation and development.

data.title: Wilshire Quinn issues $6,125,000 refinance loan for a multi-family building in North Hollywood, California.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, Wilshire Quinn Capital revealed that their private lending fund, the Wilshire Quinn Income Fund, extended a $6,125,000 refinance loan for a recently built multi-family structure in North Hollywood, California. The construction concluded in 2024, marking a significant investment in the region's real estate sector.

data.title: Art call in Copenhagen on Sept. 18, 2025, explores AI in art. Featuring T.S. Eliot quote.
data.description: In Copenhagen, Denmark, on September 18, 2025, the famous quote by T.S. Eliot, "Time present and time past / Are both perhaps present in time future, / And time future contained in time past," was highlighted. The message emphasized the relationship between past, present, and future. The exact context and origin of the quote were not provided.
